raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzijam mehs win-
neem scho Wihru Wahrdus/ kas
scho Darbu taijija.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet winnu Deewa Azz bi-
ja pahr to Judu Wezzajjeem/ ka
winxi tohs ne afsaweja/ kamehr
fchi Leeta Darijujam taptu stu-
nama darrita/ un tee pahr to
weenuGrahmatu atpakkatnestu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Schis irr tahs Grahmatas
Eekschu-Raksts/ ko Tatnajus
tas Semmes-Walditajs schat-
pufs Uppes ar Star Bosnaju un
winna Draudses/ tee Awarsaki-
teri/ kas schaipufs Uppes dsih-
woja/ us to Kehnixu Darijsfu
rakstija.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tee fuhtija us winnu
Stahstus/ un eekſch teem bija ta
raefthts : Wiſs Meers lai irr
tam Kehnixam Darijujam.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Sinnams lai irr tam Keh-
nixam/ ka mehs effam zehlu-
schees us to Semmi Juhda/ un
us ta leela Deewa Nammu/kas
uszelts tohp no leelem Akmi-
neem/ un tee Balki tohp Seenas
celtkti/ un tas pats Darbs tohp
tikkuschi darrihts/ un tsdohdahs
lubbi zaar winnu Robkahm.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Mehs tad effam tohs pa-
schus Wezzajus waizajcht/ un
ta us winneem fazzijfschi: Kas
ire jums Waltu dewischo Nam-
mu uszelt/ un scho Muhri us-
taisfht?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Mehs effaim arrt winnu
Wahrdus no teem praftifschi/ ka
mehs tew no ta Sinnu dohtum/
ka mehs us tew warretum rak-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet tee atdewe mums
tahdu Atbildeschann/ un fazzija:
Mehs effaim Kalpi ta Deewa
tahs Debbes un tahs Semmes/
un uszeltamto Nammu/ kas jaw
fenn preektchajos Gaddos irr us-
zelts bjis/ jo weens leels Keh-
nixsch pahr Israelu irr to uszeh-
lis un pabeidsis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet pehz kad muhsu Teh-
wi to Deewu tahs Debbes bij
apkaitinaifschi/ irr winsch tohs
nodewis Nebukadnezara ta Keh-
nixa no Babeles/ ta Kaldeera
Rohka/ un tas irr scho Nammu
nopohsttis/ un tohs Laudis us
Babelt Zeetuma aisweddis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet pirma Gadda Ko-
refa ta Kehnixa no Babeles/ irr
tas Kehnisch Kores pawehlejs
scho Deewa Nammu uszelt,
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ka arri ta Deewa Nam-
ma Rihkus/ kas no Selta un
Sndraba bija/ ko NebukadNe-
zara no ta Deewa Namma/ kas
Jerusalemē bija/ isiweddis/ un
tehs fawa Deewa Namma us
Babeli noweddis/ tohs irr tas
Kehnisch Kores isdwis/ no ta
Deewa Namma eekſch Babeles/
un tee irr tsdohti weenam ar
Wahrdus Sesbazars/ ko winsch
var Semmes-Walditaju bij ee-
zhlis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un winsch fazzija us to:
Reinin schohs Rihkus/ eij/ un
nowedd tohs us to Deewa Nam-
mu/ kas Jerusalemē irr/ un lat
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
